flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Southern Crescent Technical College rose 71% between 2017 and 2020 ($5.6k → $9.5k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Southern Crescent Technical College rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 ($3.1k → $3.5k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Southern Crescent Technical College rose 10% between 2021 and 2024 ($5.5k → $6.1k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Southern Crescent Technical College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (5.3% → 0.0%).
